title: ferray-polynomial: no Display/Debug formatting matching NumPy's polynomial printing
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's polynomial classes have rich formatting: str(p) shows the polynomial expression with proper Unicode symbols. ferray-polynomial derives Debug but has no Display impl showing the polynomial in human-readable form (e.g., '1.0 + 2.0·x + 3.0·x²' or '1.0·T₀ + 2.0·T₁'). This is a quality-of-life feature for debugging and notebook-style usage.
